reviews.title: Disappointing
reviews.text:
Parking area is spacious and there are traffic flow signs provided, which is a good concept. However, in reality the flow does not work. Following the signs often leads to dead ends, as some exit paths are blocked by parked cars, making it difficult to navigate and exit properly.

The parking is located in the basement with no lift access, which is quite disappointing for a hotel of this level—especially for families with children or those carrying luggage.

The kids club is also poorly maintained and feels more like a basic playground than a proper facility. There is no staff supervision, which raises safety concerns. This is surprising considering many guests are families with young children.

Overall, not ideal for families despite the number of children staying at the hotel.

reviews.title: Overpriced
reviews.text:
Stayed during Easter Holiday 2026. Unfortunately, this hotel did not meet expectations for a family-friendly resort.

The swimming pool is quite small compared to the overall hotel size, and a large portion is taken up by steps. The kids’ pool is also very limited, with no proper play features.

Beach access is disappointing. Most of the shoreline is rocky, with only a small sandy area that has murky, clay-like water—unsuitable for children.

The most concerning issue was the foam party. The foam level became excessively high, covering both the pool surface and surrounding floor. Children, including mine, were briefly submerged, causing breathing difficulties and even vomiting.

The foam also made it impossible to see the pool edges, creating a serious safety risk.

Overall, not recommended for families with young children unless safety and facilities are significantly improved.

Mir hat hat die persönliche Ansprache der Mitarbeiter und die Angebote zu den Aktivitäten mit Naturnähe wie Schnorcheln mit Haifischbabies und vielen anderen Fischen und der Vogelpark mit den Tieren die genauso freundlich sind wie die Mitarbeiter und dem Papageien "Kopi" der gar nicht mehr von meiner Schulter wollte ein eindrucksvollen wirklich entspannten Urlaub beschert. reviews.title: Zeker niet 5 sterren waardig!
reviews.positives: We hebben 3 nachten overnacht. ‘t Viel ons direct al een beetje tegen. Aangezien het toch een 5 sterren hotel is. Bij aankomst was er niemand die ons hielp met al onze bagage. Ook moesten wij zelf de receptie zoeken. Geen welkomstdrankje. Om de dag af te sluiten met onze tolk en chauffeur wilden wij iets verfrissends drinken in de lobby. Helaas was er niets eens frisdrank te krijgen. De volgende dag bij het ontbijt hadden we eieren besteld. Deze zouden naar onze tafel worden gebracht. Dit gebeurde niet en hebben wij zelf om moeten vragen. De volgende dag had ik een omelet besteld die niet goed was bereidt en nog vloeibaar was. Aan het strand is er niemand die een bestelling opneemt. Toen we zelf binnen bij het restaurant een bestelling hadden doorgegeven. Waren ze ons daarna blijkbaar vergeten. Na navraag na 45 minuten kregen we excuses en de drankjes van het huis. Er zijn dus best wat verbeterpunten. Maar gelukkig zijn er ook pluspunten. Wij hadden een couple treatment in de Quan spa en deze was heel prettig. Ook aten wij graag in het restaurant Way Manom door de prettige sfeer en de vriendelijke medewerkers. Aangezien dit het enige 5 sterren hotel is aan het strand en wij nog even een paar dagen helemaal wilden ontspannen voor onze terugreis. Keerden wij terug naar het Marriot. Helaas was dit niet een goede keuze! ‘s Morgens werden we wakker van getimmer. We zijn toen maar op tijd gaan ontbijten. Toen we terugkwamen op de kamer was het heel slecht weer en besloten we om gewoon lekker te relaxen op de kamer. Helaas werd dit ons onmogelijk gemaakt. Op de verdieping boven ons werd nl. verbouwd. Geboor en getimmer. Nadat wij geklaagd hadden, stopte het lawaai even. Maar daarna ging ‘t weer door. Dit ging zo door na de 2e keer klagen. Na de 3e keer klagen nadat ons nog steeds niet een andere kamer was aangeboden, hebben we hier zelf maar om verzocht. Ook jammer was dat we een mindere kamer terug kregen en verder geen excuses.
reviews.negatives: Ze kunnen geen 5 sterren service bieden. Klachten worden niet serieus genomen!

reviews.title: long check-in time
reviews.text: I came with my family and 2 small children. When I arrived at 2 o'clock, I had already booked and was told the room was being prepared, so we were given access to the beach and pool. By 4 o'clock, the room was still not ready, the reason being it was still being cleaned, etc. What disappointed me was that other customers who had just checked in received their rooms immediately. I asked why, and they said it was because their rooms were suites... is every room a suite? Out of all the customers who checked in at the same time, I was the only one whose room needed to be prepared for 2 hours 😅 As a compliment, they eventually offered a slice of cake... the facilities are really good, and the staff service is also great, but if the first impression is like this, it really messes up the mood, especially since the rates here are not cheap 😊😊

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
During my one-night stay at Marriott Lampung, I had a delightful experience. The check-in process was impressively quick, ensuring a smooth start to my stay. Upon entering my room, I was pleased to find it impeccably clean, creating a welcoming atmosphere.

One of the highlights was the room’s stunning view, directly facing the serene sea, which was a treat for the senses. It added an extra layer of relaxation to my stay.

While the hotel offers activities like canoeing and snorkeling, these come at an additional cost. Nonetheless, these options provide guests with enjoyable ways to explore the local surroundings if they choose.

Breakfast was another pleasant surprise, with a diverse menu catering to various tastes, ensuring a hearty start to the day. The range of choices was commendable, satisfying different preferences.

Additionally, the gym facilities were excellent, well-maintained, and equipped with everything needed for a good workout. 

Overall, my stay at Marriott Lampung was memorable, offering a mix of comfort, scenic beauty, and plenty of activity options.

reviews.title: More than just a fancy resort
reviews.text:
At first i thought this is just a fancy hotel situated on a cove, that's it.
But let me tell you, they are more than "just" that.
From the minute we enter the gate, everyone greeted us sincerely. From the security, gardener, lobster and bird keeper (yes they have that), some of them even go more talking to my fam without being too forward and we end up getting more info about places to go. Wonderful!
Rooms are nicely designed, sound proofed well, and everyone got their best view of the ocean. Bathtub facing the ocean is a nice touch.
Breakfast spread are very well thought, there are everything for everyone, catering for local tongue to expats.
Pool was at the beach, and they have a viewing deck above the bar (way Manom) next to the pool, I recommend to view sunrise and sunset from here, you can even do a stargazing here on a clear night!
Lots of activities right in the hotel area;
There is a lobster farm, kids would love this! Seeing lobsters of different sizes, some even safe to touch.
Small aviary (near the lobster farm),where the collections are mostly exotic birds like peacocks (at least 3 species are available), parrots, birds of paradise and of you're lucky you got to see hornbills flying low (this one is free roaming from nearby forest.
Sea turtle conservation, towards the beach in front of aviary. You need to swim a bit, but it's worth the extra energy, seeing different species of sea turtles in one place.
Snorkeling the end of floating jetty, oh my god , the fish! The corals, soft corals, anemones you name it. They are not more than 5 meters radius from the end of the jetty. No need to rent boat or anything, you will literally swim among school of fish!
Me and my family thoroughly enjoyed our stay here, 3 days is not enough!
Thumbs of for the management for creating such a beautiful place in touch with nature and it's local people! A rare find!
reviews.response:

Taghimo Kasih! We sincerely appreciate you taking the time to share your valuable feedback. Your insights are crucial in helping us continuously improve our services and elevate the guest experience.

reviews.title: The best icon in Lampung
reviews.text: This hotel became our main destination for a road trip to Lampung. Seeing the available facilities made the kids happy to stay here for 2 nights. From the kids club, swimming pool, beach, feeding sharks, snorkeling, and visiting the turtle sanctuary as well as animals like birds and deer, made 2 nights feel insufficient. Plus, the service was super friendly. It’s worth the price offered. With a breakfast menu that has plenty of variety and is delicious. The room size is spacious and the bathtub has a beautiful beach view. Even though the location is about 30 minutes from the city of Lampung, the roads are still fine. And we will definitely return to Marriott Lampung. The best. 👍👍👍

reviews.title: Big Thanks to Pak Zul
reviews.text:
Menginap di Lampung Marriott benar-benar jadi salah satu pengalaman yang berkesan dan tidak terlupakan ✨.
Saya memilih hotel ini karena penasaran dengan pengalaman melihat baby shark langsung di depan hotel, dan ternyata memang sesuai ekspektasi. Bahkan, bisa sekalian snorkeling menikmati keindahan lautnya.

Kalau dari segi pelayanan, fasilitas, maupun kualitas makanan, standar Marriott memang sudah tidak perlu diragukan lagi. Sama baiknya dengan hotel-hotel bintang 5 lain yang pernah saya coba. Namun, yang membuat Lampung Marriott sangat berbeda adalah unique selling point berupa pengalaman laut ini. Rasanya jarang ada hotel bintang 5 yang bisa memberikan akses langsung melihat baby shark sekaligus snorkeling dengan pemandangan coral yang indah dan ikan.

Yang juga membuat pengalaman saya semakin menyenangkan adalah keramahan staff hotel, khususnya Pak Zul. Beliau dengan sabar menjelaskan banyak hal, bahkan menawarkan untuk menemani snorkeling agar bisa melihat coral dan ikan lucu-lucu dari dekat. Attitude seperti ini benar-benar menambah nilai plus, karena terasa tulus dan sangat membantu tamu untuk merasa nyaman.

Secara keseluruhan, saya sangat puas dengan pengalaman menginap di sini. Bukan hanya karena fasilitas hotelnya yang lengkap, tapi juga karena memorable moments yang diberikan – terutama pengalaman snorkeling bersama Pak Zul dan melihat baby shark secara langsung.

Pasti akan jadi alasan kuat untuk kembali lagi jika berkunjung ke Lampung 💙
reviews.response:

Kami sangat senang mendengar bahwa pengalaman menginap di Lampung Marriott Resort & Spa telah menjadi salah satu pengalaman yang berkesan dan tidak terlupakan bagi Anda. reviews.title: The best experience
reviews.text: From the beginning of the booking, I couldn't wait to stay here; booking through Agoda got the best price. The check-in process was very quick, and the reception staff were very friendly and helpful. My child was immediately offered ice cream, and the receptionist named Jefri was very helpful, providing flexibility regarding breakfast. All the staff were very friendly, and even upon arrival, we were warmly welcomed by the security staff. Every time we met hotel staff, they greeted us with genuine smiles. The facilities are unquestionable, starting from the swimming pool, private beach, feeding fish, canoeing, aviary, playground, to the photographer—everything is available. The breakfast menu is abundant, varied, and delicious. The room was clean, the air conditioning was cold, there was a balcony, a bathtub, and a view directly to the beach. Every spot in this hotel is great for taking photos. My family and I are very satisfied and can't wait to stay here again. The checkout process was also super quick, assisted by a staff member named Irwan (or Ilham, sorry I forgot the name a bit). Overall, we are very satisfied; thank you, Marriott Lampung, for providing the best experience for our family. I am sure this will also be the best experience for my children and will be a good memory that they will cherish until adulthood.
